_meta.description: Seed list of 50 AI image enhancement/transformation prompts for the AIImageEnhancer project. Compiled from public prompt-engineering articles as a starting dataset; intended to be imported into the persistent prompts DB and refined/replaced with the user's own prompt source over time.
_meta.note: Prompts include an explicit 'preserve identity/composition' clause wherever relevant, since this will run against real personal/family photos.

prompts.title: Overall Quality Boost
prompts.prompt: Enhance the overall quality of this photo. Improve sharpness, clarity and detail, balance the lighting and contrast, and correct the colors for a clean, natural and professional look. Keep the original composition, subject and proportions exactly the same. Do not add or remove any elements and avoid an over-processed appearance.

prompts.title: Modern Camera Look
prompts.prompt: Make this look like a high-quality photo taken with a modern camera. Refine focus where it is soft, enhance fine textures, and apply natural, professional color grading with realistic depth. Preserve the identity of people, the original framing and all real details.

prompts.title: Everyday Snapshot to Pro
prompts.prompt: Elevate this everyday snapshot to professional quality. Improve exposure, sharpen key details, deepen color richness, and balance highlights and shadows, while keeping the scene, subjects and composition completely unchanged.

prompts.title: Natural Clarity Pass
prompts.prompt: Apply a natural clarity and detail enhancement to this photo without altering its content. Sharpen textures subtly, boost local contrast, and keep colors true to life.

prompts.title: Gentle All-Round Polish
prompts.prompt: Give this photo a subtle, all-round polish: balanced exposure, natural color accuracy, clean detail, and gentle noise reduction, without changing anything about the scene itself.

prompts.title: Crisp Detail Recovery
prompts.prompt: Sharpen this image and recover lost detail. Reduce blur and softness, define edges and fine textures, and restore clarity for a crisp, in-focus result. Keep the look natural, preserve the subject and composition, and avoid over-sharpening, halos or artifacts.

prompts.title: Blurry Portrait Fix
prompts.prompt: Enhance this slightly blurry portrait. Sharpen the facial features, especially the eyes and mouth, recover fine detail and retain natural skin texture under soft, realistic lighting. Preserve the person's identity, expression and proportions, and keep the result natural rather than artificially sharp.

prompts.title: Motion Blur Correction
prompts.prompt: Correct mild motion blur in this photo. Reconstruct sharp edges on the main subject, recover texture detail, and stabilize the appearance of movement without introducing ghosting or artifacts.

prompts.title: Soft Focus Rescue
prompts.prompt: Fix the soft focus in this image by carefully restoring edge definition and fine detail across the subject and background, keeping the result natural and free of ringing or halo artifacts.

prompts.title: Noise & Grain Cleanup
prompts.prompt: Clean up this image by removing noise, grain and JPEG compression artifacts. Smooth flat areas while preserving real edges, fine textures and detail. Keep facial identity, natural lighting and realistic colors intact, and avoid over-smoothing or a plastic, waxy look.

prompts.title: Low-Light Noise Reduction
prompts.prompt: Reduce heavy noise from this low-light photo while preserving genuine detail in faces and textures. Keep the mood and lighting of the original scene, and avoid a smeared or artificial look.

prompts.title: Compression Artifact Repair
prompts.prompt: Remove JPEG blockiness and color banding from this image. Smooth gradients naturally, restore fine texture, and keep all colors and details faithful to the original.

prompts.title: High-Resolution Rebuild
prompts.prompt: Upscale and restore this image to high resolution. Rebuild micro-details, refine edges and recover texture so the result looks naturally sharp and clean, not interpolated or blurry. Preserve the original colors, the subject's identity and the composition, and do not introduce new elements or artifacts.

prompts.title: 4K Upscale
prompts.prompt: Upscale this photo to a minimum of 4K resolution with smooth tonal gradations, natural fine detail, and no visible upscaling artifacts. Preserve composition and identity exactly.

prompts.title: Print-Ready Enlargement
prompts.prompt: Enlarge this image to print-ready resolution, rebuilding sharp, natural detail suitable for large-format printing while keeping the original look and content unchanged.

prompts.title: Thumbnail-to-Full-Size Recovery
prompts.prompt: Reconstruct this low-resolution image into a full-size, detailed photo. Recover believable fine texture and sharp edges without hallucinating new content or altering identity.

prompts.title: Comprehensive Restoration
prompts.prompt: Restore this photograph comprehensively and professionally. Analyze every visible form of damage or degradation, including scratches, tears, creases, stains, fading, discoloration, blur, noise, and grain, and correct each one carefully. Sharpen soft edges and facial features naturally, without over-processing. Preserve the complete facial identity and natural likeness of every person in the image without alteration.

prompts.title: Scratch & Dust Removal
prompts.prompt: Restore this old photograph to its original condition. Remove all scratches, dust, creases, stains and torn areas, and reconstruct the missing or damaged parts naturally and realistically. Preserve the original composition, the people and their facial features exactly, keeping a period-appropriate look.

prompts.title: Torn Edge Reconstruction
prompts.prompt: Repair a vintage photo with torn or missing corners and edges. Rebuild the missing areas by intelligently matching surrounding texture, tone and grain, without altering the subject.

prompts.title: Fold Line & Crease Repair
prompts.prompt: Remove fold lines, creases and stains from this photo, blending the repaired areas seamlessly with the surrounding image while preserving all original details.

prompts.title: Faded Photo Revival
prompts.prompt: Revive this faded photograph by restoring lost contrast and color depth, recovering detail in washed-out highlights and shadows, while keeping the same tones and period-appropriate look.

prompts.title: Historically Accurate Colorization
prompts.prompt: Restore and colorize this old black-and-white photograph. Apply realistic colorization based on natural skin tones, clothing, and environment. Keep colors subtle and historically accurate, not overly saturated.

prompts.title: Cinematic Colorization
prompts.prompt: Restore and colorize this old black-and-white photo. Make all elements coherently and realistically colored with natural skin tones, then give it a rich, cinematic feel so it looks like a high-quality modern photograph. Do not change the composition, the people or any details.

prompts.title: Minimal Natural Colorization
prompts.prompt: Colorize this photo without altering, removing or adding any detail or element. Use natural, realistic and historically plausible colors with accurate skin tones.

prompts.title: Era-Aware Colorization
prompts.prompt: Colorize this black and white photograph with careful attention to historical accuracy and natural realism, using the photo's approximate era to inform clothing, object and setting colors.

prompts.title: Subtle Portrait Retouch
prompts.prompt: Subtly retouch this portrait. Even out the skin while preserving real pores, texture and fine detail, balance the lighting and enhance the eyes naturally. Keep the person's identity, expression, age and features exactly the same, and keep the edit realistic and understated.

prompts.title: Studio-Quality Portrait
prompts.prompt: Restore and enhance this portrait photograph to the visual quality standard of a professional studio shoot. Restore accurate, natural skin tones with lifelike texture — pores, fine lines, and natural variations should be visible but refined. Sharpen the eyes to achieve a natural sparkle and clarity without artificial enhancement. Do not alter the person's actual facial structure, age, or identity in any way.

prompts.title: Even Skin Tone Correction
prompts.prompt: Correct uneven skin tone and minor blemishes in this portrait while fully preserving natural skin texture, pores and the subject's true likeness.

prompts.title: Natural Glow Enhancement
prompts.prompt: Add a natural, healthy glow to the skin in this portrait using soft, realistic lighting adjustments, without smoothing away authentic texture or changing facial features.

prompts.title: Group Photo Face Clarity
prompts.prompt: Enhance facial clarity and sharpness for every person in this group photo individually, balancing lighting across faces at different distances from the camera, while keeping the full scene and composition unchanged.

prompts.title: Exposure & White Balance Fix
prompts.prompt: Fix the lighting and color in this photo. Recover detail in shadows and highlights, correct the white balance and exposure, and adjust warmth and contrast for a balanced, natural result. Keep skin tones realistic, preserve the subject and composition, and avoid an over-edited look.

prompts.title: Shadow & Highlight Recovery
prompts.prompt: Optimize the lighting and contrast of this image to reveal hidden details. Brighten underexposed or shadowy areas, especially faces, without introducing grain or altering the scene.

prompts.title: Backlit Subject Correction
prompts.prompt: Correct a backlit or silhouetted subject in this photo by lifting shadow detail on the subject's face and body while preserving natural background exposure and color.

prompts.title: Golden Hour Warmth
prompts.prompt: Adjust the color grading of this photo to evoke warm, golden-hour lighting: soft warm highlights, gentle shadows, and natural skin tones, without changing the scene or time-of-day cues unrealistically.

prompts.title: Overcast Day Color Pop
prompts.prompt: Enhance a photo taken on an overcast, flat-lighting day by boosting local contrast and color vibrancy naturally, making the scene feel less gray while keeping lighting believable.

prompts.title: Cinematic Color Grade
prompts.prompt: Apply a subtle cinematic color grade to this photo: soft shadows, warm-and-cool complementary tones, gentle contrast boost, and a light film-like grain, while preserving the original subject and composition.

prompts.title: Editorial Portrait Look
prompts.prompt: Give this portrait an editorial magazine look: refined contrast, rich but natural color, soft directional lighting simulation, and subtle skin retouching, keeping the person's identity fully intact.

prompts.title: Warm Nostalgic Film Look
prompts.prompt: Apply a warm, nostalgic film-photography look to this image: soft highlights, warm midtones, subtle grain, and slightly muted colors, without altering the actual scene content.

prompts.title: Black & White Fine Art Conversion
prompts.prompt: Convert this photo into a fine-art black-and-white image with rich tonal range, deep blacks, clean whites, and enhanced midtone contrast, preserving all original detail and composition.

prompts.title: Dreamy Soft Light Style
prompts.prompt: Apply a soft, dreamy lighting style to this photo with gentle highlight glow and smooth tonal transitions, while keeping the subject sharp, recognizable and true to the original scene.

prompts.title: Editorial Studio Portrait (Identity-Locked)
prompts.prompt: Using this photo strictly for facial identity and likeness reference, create a polished editorial studio portrait: soft directional key light, subtle rim light, neutral seamless backdrop, natural professional color grading. Preserve exact facial structure, proportions, eye shape, skin tone and hairstyle — do not alter or beautify the person's actual features.

prompts.title: Outdoor Cinematic Portrait (Identity-Locked)
prompts.prompt: Using this photo strictly for facial identity reference, create a hyper-realistic cinematic outdoor portrait of the same person in the same setting: natural golden-hour light, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture. Preserve the person's exact face, proportions and expression — no identity drift.

prompts.title: Festive/Celebration Portrait (Identity-Locked)
prompts.prompt: Using this photo strictly for facial likeness, create a warm, high-end celebratory portrait suited to the occasion visible in the photo (e.g. birthday, festival, holiday): tasteful festive lighting and color accents, natural expression preserved. Face and identity are strictly non-negotiable — do not change facial structure, age or features.

prompts.title: Background Blur (Bokeh)
prompts.prompt: Add a natural, realistic background blur (bokeh) behind the main subject to simulate a shallow depth-of-field look from a portrait lens, keeping the subject in full sharp focus.

prompts.title: Clean Studio Backdrop
prompts.prompt: Replace the background of this photo with a clean, soft-gradient studio backdrop, adding even, soft lighting that matches the subject, without altering the subject itself.

prompts.title: Distraction Removal
prompts.prompt: Remove minor distracting background elements (clutter, stray objects, passersby) from this photo while seamlessly reconstructing the background behind them, keeping the main subject completely untouched.

prompts.title: Sky Enhancement
prompts.prompt: Enhance a dull or overexposed sky in this outdoor photo: recover cloud detail, deepen natural blue tones or add realistic warm sunset color if appropriate, while keeping the rest of the scene unchanged.

prompts.title: Landscape Detail & Color Pop
prompts.prompt: Enhance this landscape photo by boosting natural color vibrancy in foliage, sky and water, sharpening fine details like leaves and textures, and balancing overall exposure, without making it look artificial.

prompts.title: Golden Hour Landscape Grade
prompts.prompt: Apply a natural golden-hour color grade to this landscape photo: warm low-angle light tones, soft long shadows, and enhanced sky color, while preserving the true scene layout.

prompts.title: Clean Product Shot
prompts.prompt: Edit this product photo for a professional listing: remove the background and replace it with pure white, make lighting even across the entire product with no harsh shadows, and increase sharpness and clarity so all textures and details are visible.
